name: Trace-o-matic

consumes.minimum: 1 active comp + exactly 1 selected layer with ≥1 mask
consumes.description: Reads the active CompItem; reads the first selected layer; reads its ADBE Mask Parade group (all masks); for each mask reads ADBE Mask Shape keyframes (path + time) and ADBE Mask Opacity keyframes (opacity value + time).

functions: guard: alerts and exits when no project is open
guard: alerts and exits when no active composition is present
guard: alerts and exits when the number of selected layers is not exactly 1
guard: alerts and exits when the selected layer has no masks
create a new shape layer named 'Shapes from <source layer name>' in the active comp
add an ADBE Slider Control effect named 'Fill Opacity' with default value 100
add an ADBE Color Control effect named 'Fill Color' with default RGBA [1, 0, 0, 1]
add an ADBE Slider Control effect named 'Stroke Opacity' with default value 100
add an ADBE Color Control effect named 'Stroke Color' with default RGBA [0, 0, 1, 1]
add an ADBE Slider Control effect named 'Stroke Width' with default value 5
for each mask: add a shape group named after the mask inside ADBE Root Vectors Group
for each mask: add an ADBE Vector Shape - Group (path) inside the shape group Contents
for each mask: add an ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill and wire its Color and Opacity via AE expressions to the Fill Color and Fill Opacity effect controls on the shape layer
for each mask: add an ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke and wire its Color, Opacity, and Stroke Width via AE expressions to the corresponding stroke effect controls on the shape layer
for each mask: copy all ADBE Mask Shape keyframes (path values + times) to the shape path as HOLD keyframes
for each mask: copy all ADBE Mask Opacity keyframes (opacity values + times) to the shape group Transform Opacity as HOLD keyframes
remove consecutive shape group opacity keyframes with identical values to reduce redundancy
remove shape path keyframes at times where the group opacity is zero (invisible frames pruned)
wrap all mutations in a single undo group named 'Trace-o-matic'

scriptSim.scenario: success — two masked AV layer → shape layer with effect controls and expressions
scriptSim.inputs: Active comp 'Main Comp' (1920×1080, 24fps, 5s); one AV layer 'Animated Footage' selected; layer has two masks — 'Mask 1' (2 path keyframes at t=0,1; 2 opacity keyframes at t=0,1 both value 100) and 'Mask 2' (2 path keyframes at t=0,2; 2 opacity keyframes at t=0→80, t=2→0); script runs headless with no UI actions

Trace-o-matic

expressions.target: Shapes from Animated Footage/ADBE Root Vectors Group/Mask 1/Contents/ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/Color

sim.note: The expression is a direct effect lookup — it returns the color value set on the Fill Color control; sweeping controlValue over [0,1] represents one channel component changing from black to full.

expressions.target: Shapes from Animated Footage/ADBE Root Vectors Group/Mask 1/Contents/ADBE Vector Graphic - Fill/Opacity

sim.note: Sweeps the Fill Opacity slider from 0 to 100; output is the opacity value passed directly to the fill (0% fully transparent → 100% fully opaque).

expressions.target: Shapes from Animated Footage/ADBE Root Vectors Group/Mask 1/Contents/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/Color

sim.note: The expression returns the stroke color value from the Stroke Color effect control; sweeping controlValue represents one color channel from 0 to 1.

expressions.target: Shapes from Animated Footage/ADBE Root Vectors Group/Mask 1/Contents/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/Opacity

sim.note: Sweeps the Stroke Opacity slider from 0 to 100; output is the stroke opacity (0% invisible → 100% fully opaque).

expressions.target: Shapes from Animated Footage/ADBE Root Vectors Group/Mask 1/Contents/ADBE Vector Graphic - Stroke/Stroke Width

sim.note: Sweeps the Stroke Width slider from 0 to 50 pixels; output is the stroke width value (default 5px, range 0–50px covers practical usage).

notes: UI mode is HEADLESS — the script has no ScriptUI dialog and runs immediately on execution.

The five expressions (fill color, fill opacity, stroke color, stroke opacity, stroke width) are written identically onto every mask's shape group; the expressions shown above use 'Mask 1' as the representative target — the same five templates are applied to all mask groups with the same shape layer name.
The shape layer name is dynamically built as 'Shapes from <source layer name>'; if that name changes the expression references break.
Hold interpolation (KeyframeInterpolationType.HOLD) is applied to every copied path and opacity keyframe, producing frame-by-frame animation style.

Keyframe cleanup removes consecutive opacity keyframes with identical values and removes path keyframes at times where opacity is zero; this post-processing is performed in a single pass after all masks are converted.
Original masks on the source layer are not modified (non-destructive operation).
Fill Color is added as an ADBE Color Control (not a slider); its expression references the 'Color' sub-property, not 'Slider'.
The script requires exactly 1 selected layer (not 0, not 2+); selecting multiple layers triggers the 'Please select one layer' guard.
